content.en: Who’s a good dog?! Dogs are great! When we come home, they show us love and happiness! They make us laugh. They make us walk! We play with them.
content.tw: 誰是乖狗狗？！狗狗真棒！回到家的時候，狗狗會用愛與快樂讓我們開懷大笑！我們和狗狗出門散步、玩遊戲，度過快樂的時光。

content.en: Dogs want to be with others. They want to do everything together. That is why they look so happy to see us!
content.tw: 狗是群居動物，喜歡跟別人待在一起，也喜歡一起做各種事情。所以每次看到我們回家的時候，牠們總是特別興奮！

content.en: When we go out, we worry. Our dogs do not want to be alone. But we cannot be with them all the time…
content.tw: 不過，當我們出門的時候，也會擔心家裡的狗狗。牠們不喜歡孤單，但我們又不可能隨時陪在牠們的身邊……

content.en: What can we do?! We can go online and find... TV for dogs! TV for dogs are videos made for dogs.
content.tw: 那該怎麼辦呢？其實，我們可以上網找「狗狗電視」！這是專門為狗狗設計的影片。

content.en: Our dogs can watch other dogs, other animals, fun toys, and much more! They can watch them in blue and yellow. Those are the colors dogs see best.
content.tw: 牠們可以看其他的狗、各種動物、有趣的玩具等等。影片中的畫面也會以藍色跟黃色為主，因為這是狗狗最容易看清楚的顏色。

content.en: Thunder, fireworks, and other loud sounds can scare our dogs. TV for dogs does not scare dogs with sounds. Our dogs can listen to calm music and nice sounds.
content.tw: 打雷、放煙火或其他巨大聲響，常常會讓狗狗感到害怕。但狗狗電視不會播放會嚇到牠們的聲音。相反地，裡面有舒緩的音樂跟輕鬆的自然聲響。

content.en: Now we do not have to worry. We can go to school or work. Our dogs will not feel alone!
content.tw: 現在我們不用擔心了。我們可以去上學或工作。我們的狗狗將不會感到孤獨！

vocabulary.preface: 狗是群居動物，不喜歡孤獨。現在有新的辦法陪伴狗狗。

content.text:
1. music 音樂。
Hey, are those your headphones Buddy is wearing? 巴弟戴著你的耳機嗎?
Yeah, Buddy likes soft music. 是的，巴弟喜歡輕柔的音樂。
Dogs like music? That’s news to me. 狗狗喜歡音樂?這可是新聞。

2. sound 聲音。
They really do. 牠們真的喜歡。
They’re scared of loud and noisy sounds. 牠們害怕吵鬧的聲音。
But why the headphones? 但是為什麼戴耳機?
Oh, I don’t want music when I’m watching TV. 我看電視的時候不要有音樂。

3. listen 注意聽。
So you watch TV and Buddy listens to music. 所以你看電視，巴弟聽音樂。

4. all the time 整天。
I can’t be with Buddy all the time. 我不能整天跟牠在一起。
Music makes him feel less alone. 音樂讓牠比較不孤單。

vocabulary.postscript:
你記得今天的單字嗎?
music音樂 sound聲音 listen注意聽 all the time整天

quiz.question: 1. Where can we find TV for dogs?
2. What kind of sounds does TV for dogs have?
3. What colors can dogs see best?
